title: Machine Learning Engineer
required_qualifications: Software engineering skills and proficiency in Python
BS degree and 10+ years of experience
preferred_qualifications: Passion for delivering high quality features to large groups of diverse end-users
Excellent communication and experience working with multi-functional teams
Self-motivated with proven track record to optimally prioritize and deliver tasks on schedule
MS degree in computer vision, computer graphics, machine learning or related field
PhD in computer vision, computer graphics, machine learning, computer science, computer engineering or related fields.
responsibilities: deliver algorithms that power Apple Vision Pro's Eyesight, Persona and other VisionOS technologies
discover and build solutions to previously-unsolved challenges in human representation and motion impacting millions of users
developing ML models for computer vision and graphics applications
actively involved in the whole ML cycle from data collection design and data processing to model design and experiments to validation and QA in the wild
perform applied research development to adapt state-of-the-art methods or implement new methods to ship features on visionOS and iOS platforms
work closely with other ML engineers as well as data and software engineers both internally and multi-functionally
education: BS degree required; MS or PhD in computer vision, computer graphics, machine learning or related field preferred
